/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/Core/Graphics/Vertex/EBO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/Core/Graphics/Vertex/VBO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/Core/Graphics/Vertex/VAO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/Core/Graphics/Shader/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/src/Core/Graphics/Texture/texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_app.dir/_deps_external/glad/src/glad.c.o -o my_app  _deps/fmt-build/libfmt.a _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a libimgui.a _deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a libstb_image.a _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/librt.a -lm -ldl /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
